description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named push that runs on every push to the master branch. The workflow has write permission to repository contents and consists of two jobs: deploy_documentation and build_ibamr_cmake_016. The deploy_documentation job compiles and deploys Doxygen documentation, while the build_ibamr_cmake_016 job builds IBAMR with CMake and updates the cache for multiple build configurations. Additionally, there is a third job build_ibamr_archlinux_016_autotools that builds IBAMR with autotools.
